name: Battery Trend Scout
description: Build a polished macOS battery utility that shows charge, power source, energy mode, significant energy users, and local drain trends from a menu bar surface.
short_description: Calm Mac-style battery panel with charge, power source, energy mode, and trend context.
default_prompt: Use $battery-trend-scout to build a polished macOS battery menu-bar utility with charge, power source, energy mode, and trend context.
